prediction_boundary: P76 is a diagnostic selection and planning exercise only. 'Selected rule' means the preferred shadow-tracking rule for 2026 accumulation — NOT a production deployment, NOT a betting recommendation, NOT a market-edge claim. paper_only=True, diagnostic_only=True.

step3_decision.decision_reason: Score delta 0.0003 < threshold 0.02. HOME_PLUS_AWAY_125 wins axes: ['directional', 'future_readiness'] (score=0.5543); HOME_PLUS_AWAY_100 wins axes: ['calibration', 'coverage'] (score=0.5540). Dual finalists retained pending 2026 live accumulation data.

monthly_cadence.action: First mid-season check-in (P77). Collect Tier C 2026 games.
Tier B count check. Rolling accuracy monitor.
Mid-season stability review. Adjust shadow rule if needed.
P78 trigger: if Tier B n>=200, run sample expansion analysis.
P80 trigger: if odds API key acquired, run market-edge analysis.

tier_b_threshold.description: Tier B (|sp_fip_delta| 0.25–0.50) requires n>=200 before P78 full analysis. Currently tracking monthly accumulation since 2026 regular season start.

stop_criteria.description: If rolling 100-game hit_rate falls below 0.55, halt primary rule tracking and escalate to P_REVIEW phase.

market_edge_resume.required_condition: THE_ODDS_API_KEY acquired AND historical odds for 2025-2026 available
market_edge_resume.description: Market-edge (CLV/EV) analysis deferred until external odds provider key available. No live API calls in current pipeline.

step5_roadmap.name: Corrected Tier C Final Rule Selection + 2026 Accumulation Plan
step5_roadmap.goal: Tie-break HOME_PLUS_AWAY_125 vs HOME_PLUS_AWAY_100; define accumulation plan.
step5_roadmap.output: Selected rule for shadow tracking; 2026 monthly cadence defined.
step5_roadmap.gate: Scorecard delta >= 0.02 for selection; else dual retention.

step5_roadmap.name: 2026 Mid-Season Check-in (Tier C Live Accumulation)
step5_roadmap.goal: First live accuracy check on primary selected rule using 2026 season games.
step5_roadmap.output: 2026 hit_rate vs 2025 baseline; rolling accuracy plot; Tier B count update.
step5_roadmap.gate: n>=30 games in 2026 season. Rolling hit_rate > 0.55.

step5_roadmap.name: Tier B Sample Expansion Analysis
step5_roadmap.goal: Full Tier B (|sp_fip_delta| 0.25–0.50) analysis when n>=200.
step5_roadmap.output: Tier B operational gate result; comparison to Tier C.
step5_roadmap.gate: Tier B n>=200 confirmed by P77 accumulation.

step5_roadmap.name: Combined Tier Analysis (Tier B + Tier C)
step5_roadmap.goal: Evaluate combined Tier B + Tier C rule vs separate-tier strategy.
step5_roadmap.output: Combined vs separate tier comparison; recommend optimal tier configuration.
step5_roadmap.gate: Both Tier B and Tier C have n>=200 in 2026 data.

step5_roadmap.name: Market-Edge Integration (Odds-Lane)
step5_roadmap.goal: Integrate historical/live odds for CLV and edge estimation.
step5_roadmap.output: CLV correlation with prediction accuracy; EV distribution analysis.
step5_roadmap.gate: Requires THE_ODDS_API_KEY and >=100 games with pregame odds.

step5_roadmap.name: Strategy Finalization + Research Archive
step5_roadmap.goal: Finalize optimal prediction rule; archive research chain P72A→P81.
step5_roadmap.output: Final recommended rule; full chain report; deployment readiness checklist.
step5_roadmap.gate: All prior phases complete; paper_only=True maintained throughout.
